No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Settlement Agreement is Granted. No opposition filed. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)

MINI MINUTES:
